llm1.overview_of_the_company: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting.
llm1.core_value_proposition: Helping clients navigate their digital journey;Delivering innovative solutions;Providing exceptional customer experience
llm1.vision: To be a globally respected corporation that provides best-of-breed business solutions.
llm1.mission: To achieve our objectives in an environment of fairness, honesty, and courtesy towards our clients, employees, vendors, and society at large.
llm1.unique_differentiators: Global Delivery Model;Innovative Solutions;Strong Client Relationships
llm1.weaknesses_gaps_in_offering: Dependence on few large clients;Limited presence in certain geographies
llm1.key_challenges_and_unmet_needs: Staying ahead of the competition;Addressing emerging technologies;Managing talent acquisition and retention
llm1.interesting_facts: Founded by 7 engineers with an initial investment of $250;First Indian company to be listed on NASDAQ
llm1.recent_news: Infosys launches new digital transformation platform;Infosys acquires Simplus
llm1.key_business_leaders: U B Pravin Rao;Ravi Kumar S;Mohit Joshi
llm1.awards_and_recognitions: Best Company to Work For;Most Innovative Company;Best IT Services Provider

llm2.core_value_proposition: Helping clients navigate digital transformation;Delivering innovative solutions;Providing exceptional customer experience

llm2.recent_news: Infosys launches new digital transformation platform;Infosys acquires Simplus;Infosys named a leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant
llm2.key_business_leaders: U B Pravin Rao;Ravi Kumar S;Mohit Joshi
llm2.awards_and_recognitions: Best Company to Work For;Most Innovative Company;Best IT Services Provider

llm3.overview_of_the_company: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in more than 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly orchestrate their leverage of the ever-changing tides of technology.
